rationale: The citing paper references Kivetz and Simonson (2002) only briefly in the General Discussion as a possible alternative explanation, suggesting customers might save points to redeem on luxury items and reduce guilt. This citation is not used to build the focal model, derive core hypotheses, operationalize measures, or guide the empirical estimation. The paper's main framework is developed from mental accounting/prospect theory and Drèze and Nunes, with Kivetz and Simonson appearing as a peripheral contextual note.
